What We Offer

Our Services

Every service performed with professional-grade products and obsessive attention to detail — delivered to your door.

01

Exterior Wash

A thorough hand wash that removes desert dust, dirt, and grime — leaving your paint clean and protected.

Includes

  • Hand wash & rinse
  • Wheel & tire cleaning
  • Exterior windows
  • Hand dry
  • Tire dressing
Sedan from $60

SUV / Truck $75  •  Large SUV / Van $90

Book This Service
02

Interior Clean

A deep interior refresh that eliminates dust, debris, and odors — making your cabin feel brand new again.

Includes

  • Full vacuum
  • Dashboard wipe-down
  • Door panels & trim
  • Interior windows
  • Cup holders & console
Sedan from $80

SUV / Truck $95  •  Large SUV / Van $110

Book This Service
03

Basic Detail

The best of both — a complete exterior wash combined with a full interior clean in one single session.

Includes

  • Everything in Exterior Wash
  • Everything in Interior Clean
  • Streak-free windows
  • Tire dressing
Sedan from $120

SUV / Truck $150  •  Large SUV / Van $175

Book This Service
04 — BEST VALUE

Signature Detail

Our flagship package — a full detail plus professional wax sealant for maximum shine and long-lasting paint protection.

Includes

  • Everything in Basic Detail
  • Carnauba wax sealant
  • Leather conditioning
  • Odor treatment
  • Full interior wipe-down
Sedan from $220

SUV / Truck $260  •  Large SUV / Van $300

Book This Service
How It Works

Simple as Four Steps

01

Book Online or Call

Choose your service and pick a time that works for you. Call, text, or fill out the form below — quick and easy.

02

We Come To You

Our team arrives at your home, office, or wherever you are in the Coachella Valley — fully equipped and on time.

03

We Get To Work

Using professional-grade products, we detail your vehicle while you relax. No shortcuts, no rushing.

04

You Drive In Style

Come back to a vehicle that looks and smells immaculate. We do not leave until you are completely satisfied.

SS
7 Days a Week
Our Story

Built on Obsession,
Driven by Pride

StarShine Detailing was built on a simple belief — your vehicle deserves better than a drive-through wash. We are a mobile detailing company based in the Coachella Valley, committed to bringing professional-grade care directly to your doorstep. Every product we use, every technique we apply, is chosen with one goal: making your car look its absolute best.

We Come To You

Home, office, or anywhere in the valley — we bring the detail to you.

Pro-Grade Products

Chemical Guys and professional products only. Zero shortcuts.

Available 7 Days

Weekdays, weekends, same-day — we work around your schedule.

100% Satisfaction

We do not leave until you are completely happy with the result.

Schedule Your Detail
Where We Serve

Coachella Valley & Beyond

We serve the entire Coachella Valley. Don't see your city? Call us — we likely cover your area.

Coachella

Full service availability throughout Coachella and surrounding neighborhoods.

Indio

Covering all of Indio including residential and commercial locations.

La Quinta

Serving La Quinta including PGA West, Andalusia, and surrounding areas.

Palm Desert

Full coverage throughout Palm Desert and surrounding desert communities.

Palm Springs

Available throughout Palm Springs and the greater Palm Springs area.
